title: Dust in the Wind
why_this_song: Dust in the Wind by Kansas (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: All they are is dust in the wind
Just a drop of water in an endless sea
All we are is dust in the wind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wind" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wind" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dust" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dust" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: All we are is dust in the wind

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Dust in the Wind" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Dust in the Wind", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Dust in the Wind" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Dust in the Wind" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Dust in the Wind", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Dust in the Wind", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
